name: hip
description: Thin wrapper that exposes the system-installed ROCm/HIP SDK (hip, rocblas, hipblas and their CMake configs) to vcpkg consumers on Linux. ROCm is a large, system-installed SDK and is NOT built from source like other ports — this port forwards find_package(<pkg> CONFIG) to the ROCm install located via the ROCM_PATH env var, so a consumer (qvac-fabric's hip-backend feature) can build GGML_HIP against it under vcpkg's find-root scoping. Runtime libs come from the system ROCm / are shipped by the consumer.
